sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Business Mix & Commodity Exposure
required_elements: Revenue segment breakdown (trading, processing, inputs, equipment)
Commodity price exposure and sensitivity quantification
Geographic and crop mix concentration analysis
Value chain positioning (upstream, midstream, downstream)

sections.title: Input Cost & Margin Economics
required_elements: Input cost structure and production cost drivers (feedstock, labor, capital)
Gross margin bridge and commodity price pass-through lag
EBITDA margin and operating leverage analysis
Working capital cycling and seasonal cash flow timing

sections.title: Crop Cycle Positioning & Demand Drivers
required_elements: USDA WASDE forecasts and global carryover stock analysis
Acreage and yield trends with farmer economics assessment
Ethanol and feed demand linkage to commodity demand
Weather patterns and geopolitical disruption exposure

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/EBITDA multiple by commodity exposure and earnings cyclicality
Normalized through-cycle EBITDA calculation
FCF generation with working capital adjustment
Segment-level valuation for multi-line businesses

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Commodity price weakness and demand destruction risk
Input cost inflation and margin squeeze dynamics
Farmer balance sheet stress and purchasing behavior
Supply chain disruption and regulatory/ESG pressure

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Margin resilience through commodity price cycle and hedging effectiveness
Farmer demand sustainability and input volume elasticity
Commodity price cycle positioning and forward curve analysis
